$comment: Curated source of truth for the /gui-map skill. The `selector` field is skill-internal plumbing used only to locate an element for measurement; it is NEVER emitted into glossary.md or the visible map. Each element is captured in exactly one `state` (one screenshot). Handles are stable: GUI-<AREA>-<slug>, immutable, never reused.

areas.SIDEBAR: The always-visible left rail: every session grouped by project (plus Temporary and Other), the create/resume actions, and the client-side error center.
areas.HEADER: The bar above the focused session: its name and state, the floating-panel buttons, the usage chip, and the per-session controls.
areas.CONV: The scrolling conversation of the focused session, plus the one-line status summary above it.
areas.COMPOSE: The message box at the bottom of the focused session.
areas.PANEL: Floating panels shown over the conversation, one per header button.
areas.INTERACTION: The blocking modal shown over the conversation when a session needs a decision from you.
areas.MODAL: Centered modal dialogs: the new-session and resume pickers, rename, and quick preview.
areas.MENU: Transient pop-up menus summoned by a click or right-click.

working.title: A working session (stop button, current tool, waiting spinner)

compose.title: Compose box with an attached image token

elements.name: App title
elements.description: The cockpit's name at the top of the rail.

elements.name: Session group header
elements.description: A heading that groups the sessions below it; projects come first, then Temporary, then Other.

elements.name: Session row
elements.description: One session in the list; click to focus it, right-click for its actions. The focused row is highlighted.

elements.name: Session name
elements.description: The session's display name (a rename wins over the auto-title, which wins over the folder name).

elements.name: Remove-session button
elements.description: Kills the session if live and drops it from the cockpit.

elements.name: Working status dot
elements.description: Marks a session whose turn is currently running.

elements.name: Your-move status dot
elements.description: Marks an unfocused session that finished its turn and is waiting for you to read it.

elements.name: Needs-you status dot
elements.description: Marks a session blocked on a decision from you.

elements.name: Idle status dot
elements.description: Marks a session with nothing pending.

elements.name: Exited status dot
elements.description: Marks a session whose underlying process has ended.

elements.name: New-session button
elements.description: Opens the picker to start a session in a project or a temporary folder.

elements.name: Resume button
elements.description: Opens the picker to reopen a past session from history.

elements.name: GUI error chip
elements.description: Appears when client-side errors occur; toggles the error list.

elements.name: GUI error panel
elements.description: The list of recent client-side errors, with controls to clear or close it.

elements.name: GUI error entry
elements.description: One captured client-side error, with its time and an optional stack trace.

elements.name: Focused-session state icon
elements.description: The focused session's current state, shown as a shaped glyph.

elements.name: Focused-session name
elements.description: The focused session's display name.

elements.name: In-session todo button
elements.description: Toggles the panel showing the session's live task list.

elements.name: Topics button
elements.description: Toggles the panel of topics tracked for the session.

elements.name: Usage chip
elements.description: Per-turn tokens plus context fill and rolling 5-hour / 7-day usage.

elements.name: Stop button
elements.description: Interrupts the running turn; shown only while a turn is in progress.

elements.name: Permission-mode chip
elements.description: The session's permission mode; click it to change it.

elements.name: Model selector
elements.description: Switches the model the session uses.

elements.name: Effort selector
elements.description: Switches the reasoning-effort level.

elements.name: Docs button
elements.description: Opens the session's local docs file in the OS default app.

elements.name: TODO.MD button
elements.description: Toggles the panel showing the session's TODO.md.

elements.name: Status line
elements.description: A one-line summary above the log: title, current tool, and todo progress.

elements.name: Todo progress
elements.description: Completed-versus-total count of the session's todos.

elements.name: Current-tool indicator
elements.description: The tool the session is running right now.

elements.name: User message
elements.description: A turn you sent to the session.

elements.name: Assistant message
elements.description: Claude's text reply.

elements.name: Thinking block
elements.description: Claude's reasoning, collapsed by default.

elements.name: Tool card (succeeded)
elements.description: A tool call that succeeded; expand it for the input and result.

elements.name: Tool card (failed)
elements.description: A tool call that returned an error.

elements.name: Todo-list block
elements.description: A snapshot of the session's task list inline in the log.

elements.name: Compose editor
elements.description: Where you type a message; accepts pasted or dropped images.

elements.name: Send button
elements.description: Sends the composed message to the session.

elements.name: Image token
elements.description: A placeholder chip standing in for an attached image inside the message.

elements.name: Waiting spinner
elements.description: Shown between sending a turn and Claude's first output of that turn.

elements.name: Floating panel
elements.description: The shared overlay that hosts topics, in-session todos, or the TODO.md view.

elements.name: Panel close button
elements.description: Closes the floating panel.

elements.name: Topic entry
elements.description: One tracked topic: its code, name, status dot, and summary.

elements.name: Topic status dot
elements.description: The topic's state: active, parked, or resolved.

elements.name: In-session todo entry
elements.description: One task from the session's live todo list.

elements.name: TODO.md section
elements.description: A section heading from the session's TODO.md.

elements.name: TODO.md item
elements.description: A task line from the session's TODO.md, indented by its depth.

elements.name: Interaction card
elements.description: The modal that overlays the conversation when the session is waiting on you.

elements.name: Permission tool input
elements.description: The tool and arguments Claude is asking permission to run.

elements.name: Decision buttons
elements.description: Allow once, allow and remember, or deny — and the per-kind equivalents.

elements.name: Plan text
elements.description: The proposed plan awaiting your approval.

elements.name: Question option
elements.description: A selectable answer to a question Claude asked.

elements.name: Elicitation field
elements.description: An input requested by an MCP server.

elements.name: New-session picker
elements.description: Start a session: pick a cockpit project, a discovered folder, or a temporary session.

elements.name: Scope switch
elements.description: Toggles between cockpit projects and discovered folders.

elements.name: Picker search
elements.description: Filters the list by name or path.

elements.name: Older-than-7-days toggle
elements.description: Switches from the recent time-bands to the older flat list.

elements.name: Never-used chip
elements.description: Lists projects that were created but never used.

elements.name: Time-band column
elements.description: A column of entries bucketed by how recently they were last used.

elements.name: Project row
elements.description: A project to start a session in, with its last-used time.

elements.name: Create-project field
elements.description: Names and creates a new project, then starts a session in it.

elements.name: Temporary-session button
elements.description: Starts a throwaway session in a temporary folder.

elements.name: Resume picker
elements.description: Reopen a past session, grouped by folder within last-used bands.

elements.name: Resume folder group
elements.description: Past sessions grouped by the folder they ran in.

elements.name: Resume row
elements.description: A specific past session to reopen.

elements.name: Rename dialog
elements.description: Sets a custom display name for the session.

elements.name: Quick-preview window
elements.description: A read-only live view of a session without focusing it.

elements.name: Preview close
elements.description: Closes the quick-preview window.

elements.name: Session context menu
elements.description: Right-click actions for a session: quick preview, open folder, rename.

elements.name: Context-menu item
elements.description: One action in the session context menu.

elements.name: Permission-mode dropdown
elements.description: The dropdown listing all six permission modes.

elements.name: Mode option
elements.description: One permission mode, with a help tooltip explaining it.
